description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a mix of brick and flat roof elements, surrounded by mature trees and landscaping. The structure includes multiple interconnected volumes, with a prominent main building and an attached garage visible from the driveway. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard area includes a patio, a small pool, and outdoor seating, creating a private recreational space. The roof is primarily flat, with some sections slightly elevated, and the overall layout is open and spacious. The property is enclosed by greenery, offering privacy and a suburban residential feel.
description: A modern, multi-volume brick house with flat roofs, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a patio and pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the backyard, highlighting the patio, pool, and dense tree coverage around the property.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the house with the main building and garage, as well as the row of trees lining the property.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the front facade, driveway, and garage, with the main entrance and car visible.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the rear and side of the house, emphasizing the outdoor seating area, pool, and the arrangement of windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small overhang, and direct access from the driveway; minimal decorative elements.
